calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Aug-06-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day, and with the witness sworn and examined, the Court ordered the petitioner's name changed to Meeghan Anita Guidi.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Jun-06-2002 Off Calendar
